records.m_Talk_ENG:
Kyaah! It's a burg
8g I mean thief!
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Kyaah! It's a burg
8g I mean thief!
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Kyaah! It's a burg
8g I mean thief!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you okay? Which way did the thief go?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you okay? Which way did the thief go?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you okay? Which way did the thief go?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Ms. Maid?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Ms. Maid?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Ms. Maid?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm? O-oh, no! I didn't eat anything!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm? O-oh, no! I didn't eat anything!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm? O-oh, no! I didn't eat anything!

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is mine. Miss Lin always prepares my share for me!
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is mine. Miss Lin always prepares my share for me!
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is mine. Miss Lin always prepares my share for me!

records.m_Talk_ENG: And what about the thief?
records.m_Talk_DEU: And what about the thief?
records.m_Talk_FRA: And what about the thief?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm? Oh, right... Here's the calling card.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm? Oh, right... Here's the calling card.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm? Oh, right... Here's the calling card.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm... So this is the second calling card, eh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm... So this is the second calling card, eh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm... So this is the second calling card, eh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: But how was she able to leave it right under our noses?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But how was she able to leave it right under our noses?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But how was she able to leave it right under our noses?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Since you're the first witness, tell us. Where did you find it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Since you're the first witness, tell us. Where did you find it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Since you're the first witness, tell us. Where did you find it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm? She just gave it to me outside, so I took it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm? She just gave it to me outside, so I took it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm? She just gave it to me outside, so I took it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-what?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-what?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-what?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well, some girl just came up to me and gave me a burger! A gourmet one at that!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well, some girl just came up to me and gave me a burger! A gourmet one at that!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well, some girl just came up to me and gave me a burger! A gourmet one at that!

records.m_Talk_ENG: She said that all I had to do was scream that a thief broke in when morning came.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She said that all I had to do was scream that a thief broke in when morning came.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She said that all I had to do was scream that a thief broke in when morning came.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So... I just said yes!
records.m_Talk_DEU: So... I just said yes!
records.m_Talk_FRA: So... I just said yes!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You aided a thief because she gave you a burger?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You aided a thief because she gave you a burger?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You aided a thief because she gave you a burger?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Had she come in, it would've been a disaster!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Had she come in, it would've been a disaster!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Had she come in, it would've been a disaster!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph! There are no bad people who give away burgers, you know!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph! There are no bad people who give away burgers, you know!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph! There are no bad people who give away burgers, you know!

records.m_Talk_ENG: And she didn't come in! She just asked me to deliver the calling card and that's what I did!
records.m_Talk_DEU: And she didn't come in! She just asked me to deliver the calling card and that's what I did!
records.m_Talk_FRA: And she didn't come in! She just asked me to deliver the calling card and that's what I did!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh... I'm tired of hitting you now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh... I'm tired of hitting you now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh... I'm tired of hitting you now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What does it say on the calling card? Let's open it and read it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: What does it say on the calling card? Let's open it and read it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: What does it say on the calling card? Let's open it and read it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>There is a gift for Karin in the guest room.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>There is a gift for Karin in the guest room.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>There is a gift for Karin in the guest room.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: What's that supposed to mean?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What's that supposed to mean?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What's that supposed to mean?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's got to be some kind of code. No one would write a calling card like this.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's got to be some kind of code. No one would write a calling card like this.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's got to be some kind of code. No one would write a calling card like this.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let's head to the guest room first!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Let's head to the guest room first!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Let's head to the guest room first!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Whoa! These are the snacks that I secretly saved!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Whoa! These are the snacks that I secretly saved!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Whoa! These are the snacks that I secretly saved!

records.m_Talk_ENG: And this... is a memo?
records.m_Talk_DEU: And this... is a memo?
records.m_Talk_FRA: And this... is a memo?

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Ah hah hah, surprised? It's not good for your health to stay up all night working already.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Ah hah hah, surprised? It's not good for your health to stay up all night working already.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Ah hah hah, surprised? It's not good for your health to stay up all night working already.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Your skin has all dried up, and you look exhausted compared to the last time I saw you.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Your skin has all dried up, and you look exhausted compared to the last time I saw you.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Your skin has all dried up, and you look exhausted compared to the last time I saw you.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>I left some skincare products that are good for your skin, so use them well!</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>I left some skincare products that are good for your skin, so use them well!</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>I left some skincare products that are good for your skin, so use them well!</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well, at least nothing when missing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well, at least nothing when missing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well, at least nothing when missing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's not true! She's taunting us! She's taunting me!
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's not true! She's taunting us! She's taunting me!
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's not true! She's taunting us! She's taunting me!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh... How far will she go to underestimate me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh... How far will she go to underestimate me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh... How far will she go to underestimate me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: This humiliation... I'll pay it back with interest!
records.m_Talk_DEU: This humiliation... I'll pay it back with interest!
records.m_Talk_FRA: This humiliation... I'll pay it back with interest!
